<!--
This project uses multiple PR templates stored in `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/`.

Choose the correct template using one of the links below (replace `<your-branch>` with your branch name):
- **Feature**  → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=feature.md
- **Fix**      → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=fix.md
- **Refactor** → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=refactor.md
- **Test**     → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=test.md
- **Chore**    → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=chore.md
- **Docs**     → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=docs.md
- **Style**    → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=style.md
- **Perf**     → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=perf.md
- **CI**       → https://github.com/<username>/<repo>/compare/main...<your-branch>?quick_pull=1&template=ci.md

For branch, commit, and PR standards, see the dev references.
-->
